news.t: Invesco to Advance Active Capabilities with Three New Active ETFs

holdings.infoBox: QQHG is an equity ETF with a total of 250 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.33%, Apple at 7.34%, Alphabet at 6.51%, Micron Technology at 5.34%, and Microsoft at 5.00%.

overview.description: The Invesco QQQ Hedged Advantage ETF (QQHG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund seeks to provide capital appreciation through an actively managed portfolio that holds Nasdaq-100 stocks. The fund employs an options overlay strategy to partially hedge downside risk. QQHG was launched on May 7, 2025 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Invesco to Advance Active Capabilities with Three New Active ETFs
data.text: Invesco launches three high-quality, active ETF strategies that effectively leverage the expertise of its in-house active managers. ATLANTA , May 7, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Invesco Ltd.
